productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women White Tunics
description: Composition White tunic made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with a full buttoned placket, pintucks from the shoulder to the hem, three quarter sleeves with a mid-arm tab, thin loops at the sides and a curved hem Comes with an slim tie-style belt Fit Regular Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Designed for those with a sense of heightened style, this T-shirt doesn't compromise on looks and comfort. The belt adds a subtle touch of class to this top. Team it with skinny jeans and heeled, sleek sandals for that chic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
